content:
## Page Section / Title  
(No explicit section title visible on the page, but content relates to a personal brand or contact card for Jeff Abbott)  


## All Verbatim Text  
- INVESTOR  
- ENTREPENEUR  
- EDUCATOR  
- COMMUNITY BUILDER  
- Jeff  
- Abbott  
- Founder and Chief Organizer, AiSalon  
- General Partner, Blitzscaling Ventures  
- (1) 520.743.6878  
- jeff@aisalon.ai  
- aisalon  


## Visual Elements  
### Logos  
- A square logo with rounded corners (pink background) featuring a stylized meerkat/animal illustration.  
- The "aisalon" logo appears in the bottom-right corner: lowercase "aisalon" in a clean, sans-serif typeface.  

### Color Palette  
- **Pink (logo background)**: Bright, saturated pink (exact HEX/RGB not provided, but visually distinct).  
- **Black**: Used for text (headings, body copy, contact details).  
- **White**: Background of the page.  

### Typography  
- **Primary Typeface**: A modern, sans-serif typeface (likely a geometric or humanist sans-serif) used for:  
  - "Jeff Abbott" (large, bold, spaced letters).  
  - "INVESTOR", "ENTREPENEUR", "EDUCATOR", "COMMUNITY BUILDER" (uppercase, smaller size).  
  - "Founder and Chief Organizer, AiSalon" / "General Partner, Blitzscaling Ventures" (regular weight, smaller size).  
- **Contact Details**: Smaller sans-serif typeface for phone number and email.  
- **Brand Name**: "aisalon" in a clean, lowercase sans-serif (bottom-right).  

### Imagery / Photography  
- A professional headshot of a man (Jeff Abbott) in a dark blazer and light blue checkered shirt, set against a blurred office background (soft focus, neutral tones).  

### Iconography  
- A QR code with a LinkedIn icon embedded in it (black and white, standard QR code design).  

### Layout Grid  
- Two-column layout:  
  - Left column: Headshot (vertical, full height of the page).  
  - Right column: Text and contact information (vertical, full height).  
- Margins: Generous white space around all elements (clean, uncluttered).  

### Geometric / Decorative Elements  
- Rounded square (logo container) with a solid pink fill.  
- Straight, clean lines separating text blocks (no decorative borders, minimal design).  


## Page Layout Summary  
The page uses a **two-column grid** with a vertical split:  
- **Left column**: Occupies ~1/3 of the page width, containing a full-height professional headshot.  
- **Right column**: Occupies ~2/3 of the page width, containing text (name, titles, contact info) and the "aisalon" logo (bottom-right).  
- Elements are aligned to the top of the right column (logo, name, titles) and bottom (QR code, contact details), creating a balanced, hierarchical flow.  


## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page  
- **Logo Usage**: The pink square logo with the meerkat illustration is used as a brand identifier (top of the right column).  
- **Typography Hierarchy**: Clear distinction between large name text, medium title text, and small contact text (size and weight).  
- **Contact Information**: Includes a QR code (with LinkedIn icon), phone number, and email for easy access.  
- **Brand Consistency**: The "aisalon" logo is placed in the bottom-right corner to reinforce brand identity.  
- **Minimalism**: No decorative elements—focus on clean typography, professional imagery, and essential information.
